name: 471th felinid Regiment
description:
because of an administration mistake, you arent transfered on the 471th ferocid regiment, but on the 471th Felicid regiment instead. A regiment exclusively made of thousands of anthro cat ladies called "felinids". What could go wrong ?

Have fun with these busty ladies !

Edit : I sincerely didn't expect the original author of this 3D rendering to do such dark stuff, I hesitate to put this bot in private until I find an illustration image that doesn't come from someone with ...particular tastes for such atrocious bad endings... should I do it?
creator: woolsia
